ld process.t: [机] LD法, 转炉吹氧炼钢法

lda.t: abbr. 逻辑设备地址（Logical Device Address）；可用着陆距离（Landing Distance Available）；本地数据区（Local Data Area）

ldap.t: abbr. 轻量级目录访问协议（Lightweight Directory Access Protocol）

ldc.t: abbr. less developed country 不发达国家; long-distance call 长途电话; leased directive circuits 一段时间指示电路; large document copier 大的文件复印机

ldcs.t: (ldc 的复数) abbr. less developed country 不发达国家; long-distance call 长途电话; leased directive circuits 一段时间指示电路; large document copier 大的文件复印机

lddc.t: abbr. 发展中国家中的最不发达国家（least developed among developing countries）；伦敦码头区开发有限公司（The London Docklands Development Corporation）

ldeoplasty.t: [医] 意想凝注, 观念凝注

ldg.t: abbr. loading 装载; leading 主要的; lodging 住宿; landing 登陆

ldh.t: abbr. 乳酸盐脱氢酶（lactate dehydrogenase）

ldi.t: [医][=low density lipoprotein distribution index]低密度脂蛋白分布指数

ldl.t:
[计] 逻辑数据库级
[化] 低密度脂蛋白
ldl.d: n a lipoprotein that transports cholesterol in the blood; composed of moderate amount of protein and a large amount of cholesterol; high levels are thought to be associated with increased risk of coronary heart disease and atherosclerosis

ldl cholesterol.t: [网络] 低密度脂蛋白胆固醇；低密度胆固醇；坏的胆固醇

ldl-c.t: [医][=low density lipoprotein-cholesterol]低密度脂蛋白-胆固醇

ldls.t:
(LDL 的复数) [计] 逻辑数据库级
[化] 低密度脂蛋白
ldls.d:
plural of LDL
n a lipoprotein that transports cholesterol in the blood; composed of moderate amount of protein and a large amount of cholesterol; high levels are thought to be associated with increased risk of coronary heart disease and atherosclerosis

ldp.t: abbr. 自由民主党（Liberal Democratic Party）；增加标签分发协议（Label Distribution Protocol）

ldps.t: abbr. L-band digital phase shifter L波段数字移相器; load program status 装入程序状态

ldr.t: abbr. 光敏电阻（light dependent resistor）

ldrs.t: [计] 洛克希德会话检索服务系统

lds.t: abbr. 长途业务（Local Distribution Service）

ldv.t: [医][=lactic dehydrogenase virus]乳酸脱氢酶病毒

ldw.t: abbr. left defense wing (lacrosse) 左侧防御（长曲棍球）; loss damage waiver 损毁免责险
